arts.ttl: Sheikh Jassim has already made major Man United takeover decision amid Tottenham links
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur-linked Qatari businessman Sheikh Jassim has dissolved his company Nine Two UK Holdings Limited, which was once linked with his proposed buyout of Manchester United. Paperwork to register Nine Two Holdings Limited in the UK was filed two months before Sheikh Jassim's last two offers for United with the decision to register his foundation more in preparation to have formalities in place were he chosen to be the preferred candidate.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou could consider triple Tottenham change vs Man City as Maddison leaves duo at risk
arts.sum: Given Tottenham's run of three successive wins in the league, Postecoglou may not want to switch things about and that could mean Bissouma and Sarr watch on from the sidelines again. Tottenham are building some real momentum in the Premier League right now and that could stand them in good stead heading into Wednesday's game against Manchester City.

arts.ttl: How Ange Postecoglou agreed with Daniel Levy at Tottenham and the one thing he is still yet to do
arts.sum: "My only question mark, really, is once you haven't got all your players fit and probably with nine or 10 [unavailable] during that moment, you perhaps cannot play the same way as the way you want to play because you have not got the personnel to do it." Speaking on behalf of TNT Sport, who Hoddle will be representing as a pundit for the midweek round of fixtures, the former England boss explained just how coaches need to adapt to these sorts of testing times. "Management, sometimes, I have been in clubs - when I first went to Chelsea - I wanted to play three at the back but I did not have the right players at that time so we adjusted and played a different shape.

arts.ttl: Tottenham open new contract talks with 'integral' midfielder
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reported to have kicked off talks with midfielder Rodrigo Bentancur over a new contract with the club.

arts.ttl: Man City star returns to first-team training after lengthy spell out with injury - with Pep Guardiola handed major boost ahead of Tottenham clash
arts.sum: Man City, who are already out of the Champions League following their play-off defeat against Real Madrid, are sitting fourth in the league ahead of Wednesday's trip to north London.

arts.ttl: Lucas Bergvall decision made as £30m star drops out: Tottenham predicted XI v Man City
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will look to make it four Premier League wins in a row when they host Manchester City on Wednesday night. Spurs’ form has...

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid eyeing summer move for Manchester City midfielder
arts.sum: It is no secret that Atletico Madrid are chasing the signing of a new defensive midfielder, and the club hopes to end their search during the summer. Diego Simeone currently has Pablo Barrios, Rodrigo De Paul, Koke Resurreccion and Conor Gallagher as first team options – and also Thomas Lemar, although he is not counted […] The post Atletico Madrid eyeing summer move for Manchester City midfielder appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Guardiola: Haaland injury doubt for Spurs clash
arts.sum: Manchester City are sweating on the fitness of striker Erling Haaland for their Premier League trip to Tottenham Hotspur on Wednesday, manager Pep Guardiola said.

arts.ttl: Beating Arsenal and Tottenham could be ‘icing on the cake’ – Icon sees tough European nights on the way for both
arts.sum: PSV Eindhoven and AZ Alkmaar wins against Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur would be the ‘icing on the cake’ for Dutch clubs in Europe this season. That’s according to Ruud Gullit in his column for De Telegraaf, via Soccer News, who believes both teams are more than capable of knocking their English counterparts out of Europe The post Beating Arsenal and Tottenham could be ‘icing on the cake’ – Icon sees tough European nights on the way for both appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Cristian Romero involved and what Ange Postecoglou said to Mikey Moore in Tottenham training
arts.sum: The hard work continues at Hotspur Way as Tottenham look to make it four Premier League wins on the bounce. Tottenham's outfield players split into two different groups in training as they started to put in the work prior to Wednesday's game against Manchester City.
